name: Devin CLI
description: Install Devin CLI for AI-powered development

version.description: Devin CLI version to install. With installMethod=script, the upstream installer is used (version is informational; the installer always pins to the latest promoted release). With installMethod=binary, set to a concrete release tag (e.g. 2026.8.18) to pin, or 'latest' for current.

installMethod.description: How to install Devin CLI. 'script' (default) downloads the official installer and strips the interactive `devin setup` wizard so non-interactive container builds succeed. 'binary' skips the installer entirely and downloads the platform tarball directly from the manifest, which is the most headless-safe option.
